title: Tuition or Books Not Paid
desc: The school hasn't received payment, threatening late fees or registration holds.

fields.name: hasHold
fields.label: Has the school threatened registration holds or late fees?

errors: Allowing administrative delays to penalize the veteran's active enrollment.
Failing to coordinate with the School Certifying Official to resolve billing errors.

evidenceChecklist.text: Current class schedule showing enrollment dates
School account statement showing tuition invoice and billing deadlines
Email or statement from School Certifying Official confirming lack of auth

bestNextActionRules.criteria: Tuition unpaid 14 days after term start
bestNextActionRules.action: Submit urgent tuition escalation notice citing 38 C.F.R. § 21.262 to force Tungsten authorization.

reviewLaneQuestions.question: Has the school term already started?
Have you confirmed with the School Certifying Official that your enrollment is certified?
